items.title: Texans sign 2026 second-round pick TE Marlin Klein
items.summary: The Texans have gotten another key player under contract.

items.title: Sutton's predictions v Blossoms & Songer
items.summary: Chris Sutton takes on indie band Blossoms and rapper Songer plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for the FA Cup final and this weekend's Premier League fixtures.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: CSK must fill Overton-sized hole against LSG
items.summary: With four wins in their last five games, CSK have climbed to fifth place, but must now find a solution for another injury problem
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
